dynamic_rules.description: In breakout setups, ensure stops are placed beyond key absorption levels rather than just at the Value Area Low (VAL) or Value Area High (VAH) to avoid premature stop-outs.
Reduce contract size by 50% when trading IVB breakout setups with an R-ratio below 1.5, as this indicates a low reward-to-risk potential.
Avoid IVB breakout setups when delta remains positive and price fails to advance despite absorption, as this indicates trapped buyers and potential reversal risk.
During transition state days, be cautious with IVB breakouts unless there is clear initiative phase confirmation (aggressive delta flip) following absorption.
Place stops at least 2 ticks beyond the nearest significant absorption level, especially during trend_up days, to avoid premature stop-outs.
Avoid entering trades during macro news windows (09:45 EST and 10:00 EST) unless there is clear confirmation of institutional absorption and delta flip.

session_learnings: During macro news windows, liquidity voids can lead to artificial delta movements; caution is advised.
Consistent absorption with negative delta and price progression indicates strong institutional support.
Skipping low-confidence setups during trend_up days aligns with avoidance of weak reversals.
